ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season or special event */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season or special event (e.g., Fall Rates, Thanksgiving Rates) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season or special event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season or special event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the season (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the season or special event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season or special event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate (e.g., Nightly, Weekly, Weekend, Monthly) */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the rate */,
  "min_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights a guest must stay */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the rate was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., house, apartment) */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was added to the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the property details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate change entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season or special event */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate (e.g., Nightly, Weekly, Weekend, Monthly) */,
  "old_rate_value" REAL /* Old value of the rate before the change */,
  "new_rate_value" REAL /* New value of the rate after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the rate change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (should be securely hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, manager, data analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
